title: Incription To Milton
content:
The new world honors him whose lofty plea
    For England's freedom made her own more sure,
    Whose song, immortal as its theme, shall be
    Their common freehold while both worlds endure
meaning: About: John Greenleaf Whittier (December 17, 1807 � September 7, 1892) was an American Quaker poet and forceful advocate of the abolition of slavery in the United States.
